message:
Add gt dolt dump command for goroutine stack dumps

Sends SIGQUIT to the running Dolt server to dump goroutine stacks to
the log file. Per Tim Sehn (Dolt CEO), this is the recommended way to
diagnose hung servers. View output with gt dolt logs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
